title: Revert "Remove `hello` multi-arch image build"
body:
This reverts commit 7e0130f75cc27ae32d8843a8be8d2588aa2dcee9.

It broke CI, not just on podman but on Buildah too. Buildah bud
tests require the hello subdirectory.
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

I think the best fix for this is to stop buildah from relying on podman for its tests.

https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4994

>stop buildah from relying on podman for its tests

Agreed but that then needs to propagate to all active buildah branches, *and* all active podman branches which run buildah-bud tests. That will take days of dedicated effort. This PR is still necessary.

@edsantiago what exactly is needed in the `hello` dir?  I'm wondering if I may update the README to point at the new repo.

Also, I'm pretty sure we can keep the `.cirrus.yml` changes.  The job is both broken (not working) and should not be fixed to run on this repo.

CI is broken. This is an emergency to get PRs flowing. I would like to merge this right now (force-merge, since, duh, CI is broken). We can nitpick later.

@containers/podman-maintainers mergeme
@rhatdan can you force merge?  It will turn green after this PR merges.

I can :smile: 

> CI is broken. This is an emergency to get PRs flowing. I would like to merge this right now (force-merge, since, duh, CI is broken). We can nitpick later.

That's fine, just thinking to getting a head start on the list.

Thank you @cevich!

@vrothberg @rhatdan @Luap99 @jakecorrenti @mtrmac @n1hility please rebase and repush
